user.title: BMS Smart Panel
user.description: Manage wall-mounted BMS panels from Home Assistant. After installation a 'BMS Panels' item appears in the HA sidebar — add panels and configure their screens and bindings there.

abort.already_configured: BMS Smart Panel is already configured.

add_panel.name: Add panel
add_panel.description: Creates a new BMS panel and registers sensor.bms_panel_<id>.

remove_panel.name: Remove panel
remove_panel.description: Removes a panel and its config.

update_config.name: Update config
update_config.description: Updates the full config of a panel. Validation errors block saving.

reset_config.name: Reset config
reset_config.description: Resets a panel config to defaults.

clone_panel.name: Clone panel
clone_panel.description: Creates a new panel with the same screens/settings, without entity bindings.
